title: RFTools Base Jappa Textures
description: RFTools Base dimensional shard ores but with Jappa textures
body:
# RFTools Base Jappa Textures
RFTools Base dimensional shard ores but with Jappa textures. That's all there is to it, really.

### Why did you make this?
I was playing FTB Academy 1.16 and noticed that the textures RFTools Base uses for the dimensional shards in 1.16.5 use the old programmer textures rather than the new Jappa textures. This is incredibly jarring when it's surrounded by stone, netherrack, or end stone that uses the Jappa textures. So I quickly whipped up this texture pack to fix that.
